m: to be imminent; to be pressing; to be urgent

ex.jp: 締め切りが差し迫っているのに、まだ半分も終わっていない。
ex.en: The deadline is imminent, yet I haven't even finished half.

qs.s: 試験まで時間が＿＿＿＿中、焦らず着実に勉強することが大切だ。
qs.en: With the exam pressing close, it is important to study calmly and steadily.
qs.e: 差し迫る(さしせまる) = to be imminent/pressing (deadline, crisis). 迫る(せまる) = to draw near / press. 近づく(ちかづく) = to approach/get closer. 切迫する(せっぱくする) = to be urgent/critical (more formal).

qs.s: 「差し迫る」の意味は？
o: to be imminent; to be pressing
qs.e: 差し迫る = being right on the doorstep (差し迫った問題 = an urgent problem, 差し迫った状況 = a pressing situation, 締め切りが差し迫る = the deadline is imminent).

m: apology; excuse; justification

ex.jp: ご迷惑をおかけして、本当に申し訳ありません。
ex.en: I am truly sorry for the inconvenience caused.

qs.s: 今回の件については＿＿＿＿ない気持ちでいっぱいです。
qs.en: I am filled with nothing but apology regarding this matter.
qs.e: 申し訳(もうしわけ) = apology / excuse (申し訳ない = inexcusable / I'm so sorry). 言い訳(いいわけ) = an excuse (often dismissive). 釈明(しゃくめい) = a public clarification. 弁解(べんかい) = a defense/justification.

qs.s: 「申し訳」の意味は？
o: apology; excuse (申し訳ない = very sorry)
qs.e: 申し訳ない = there is no excuse / I am deeply sorry (the most common polite apology in Japanese). 申し訳 alone appears in phrases like 申し訳程度 = just for form's sake.

m: to postpone; to hold off; to suspend

ex.jp: 悪天候のため、イベントの開催を見合わせることになった。
ex.en: Due to bad weather, it was decided to suspend holding the event.

qs.s: リスクが高いため、今回の投資は＿＿＿＿ることにした。
qs.en: Due to the high risk, we decided to hold off on the investment this time.
qs.e: 見合わせる(みあわせる) = to hold off / suspend temporarily (waiting for better conditions). 見送る(みおくる) = to pass on / defer (a plan). 延期する(えんきする) = to postpone (to a later date). 中止する(ちゅうしする) = to cancel.

qs.s: 「見合わせる」の意味は？
o: to suspend; to hold off temporarily
to pass on; to defer (a plan)
qs.e: 見合わせる = temporarily holding back to reassess (運行を見合わせる = to suspend service, 購入を見合わせる = to hold off buying).

m: to conflict; to disagree; to be at odds

ex.jp: 双方の証言が食い違い、真相の解明に時間がかかった。
ex.en: The testimonies of both parties conflicted, and it took time to clarify the truth.

qs.s: 二人の意見が大きく＿＿＿＿っており、話し合いが難航している。
qs.en: The two people's opinions are greatly at odds and the discussion is making difficult progress.
qs.e: 食い違う(くいちがう) = to be at odds / conflict (facts, testimonies, opinions). 相違する(そういする) = to differ (formal). 対立する(たいりつする) = to oppose / be in conflict. ぶつかる = to clash / collide.

qs.s: 「食い違う」の意味は？
o: to conflict; to be at odds
qs.e: 食い違う = two things that should match but don't (話が食い違う = the stories don't match, 利害が食い違う = interests conflict).

m: to pay in; to deposit; to remit

ex.jp: 受講料は来月末までに指定口座に払い込んでください。
ex.en: Please remit the course fee to the designated account by the end of next month.

qs.s: 保険料を毎月自動で＿＿＿＿む設定にしている。
qs.en: I have it set up to automatically pay in the insurance premium every month.
qs.e: 払い込む(はらいこむ) = to pay into / remit (to an account or fund). 振り込む(ふりこむ) = to transfer money (bank transfer). 支払う(しはらう) = to pay (general). 納める(おさめる) = to pay/submit (taxes, fees officially).

qs.s: 「払い込む」の意味は？
o: to pay in; to remit (to an account)
qs.e: 払い込む = putting money into a designated place (資本金を払い込む = to pay in capital, 保険料の払い込み = premium payment).

m: to surface; to come to light; to emerge

ex.jp: 調査を進めるうちに、新たな問題が浮かび上がってきた。
ex.en: As the investigation progressed, new problems came to light.

qs.s: データを分析したところ、興味深い傾向が＿＿＿＿った。
qs.en: When the data was analyzed, an interesting trend emerged.
qs.e: 浮かび上がる(うかびあがる) = to surface / come to light (naturally). 明らかになる(あきらかになる) = to become clear. 見えてくる(みえてくる) = to start to become visible. 判明する(はんめいする) = to become known / be established.

qs.s: 「浮かび上がる」の意味は？
o: to surface; to come to light
to become clear; to be revealed
to be established; to become known
qs.e: 浮かび上がる = rising up to the surface from below (問題が浮かび上がる = a problem surfaces, 姿が浮かび上がる = a figure emerges).

m: to impose; to force on; to push onto

ex.jp: 自分の価値観を他人に押し付けるのは良くない。
ex.en: It is not good to impose your own values on others.

qs.s: 責任を部下に＿＿＿＿上司は信頼されない。
qs.en: A boss who pushes responsibility onto subordinates will not be trusted.
qs.e: 押し付ける(おしつける) = to force/impose on someone (a view, task). なすりつける = to pin on / shift blame onto. 転嫁する(てんかする) = to shift (blame, costs) onto someone else (formal).

qs.s: 「押し付ける」の意味は？
o: to impose; to force on someone
qs.e: 押し付ける = unilaterally forcing something on someone (意見を押し付ける = to impose an opinion, 仕事を押し付ける = to dump work on someone).

m: discernment; accurate judgment; determining

ex.jp: 状況の見極めが早い人は、どんな環境でも活躍できる。
ex.en: A person who can quickly size up a situation can be active in any environment.

qs.s: 投資において、タイミングの＿＿＿＿が成否を分ける。
qs.en: In investing, the accuracy of judging timing determines success or failure.
qs.e: 見極め(みきわめ) = decisive assessment / discernment (the act of judging accurately). 見通し(みとおし) = outlook. 判断(はんだん) = judgment. 目利き(めきき) = an expert eye / connoisseurship.

qs.s: 「見極め」の意味は？
qs.e: 見極め = the act of definitively sizing something up (見極めが肝心 = discernment is key, 見極める力 = the ability to judge accurately).

m: based on; taking into account; building on

ex.jp: 現状を踏まえた上で、最善策を考えよう。
ex.en: Let's think of the best measure, building on an understanding of the current situation.

qs.s: 議論の結果を＿＿＿＿、最終決定を下した。
qs.en: Based on the results of the discussion, we made a final decision.
qs.e: 踏まえた上で = building on / after duly considering (strong nuance of standing on that foundation before acting). 踏まえて = based on (same but slightly lighter). 基づいて(もとづいて) = based on (formal). 考慮して(こうりょして) = taking into consideration.

qs.s: 「踏まえた上で」の意味は？
qs.e: 踏まえた上で implies thoroughly digesting something before acting (事実を踏まえた上で判断する = to judge after fully taking the facts on board).

m: to set aside; to leave out; to disregard

ex.jp: 他のことは差し置いて、まずこの問題を解決すべきだ。
ex.en: Setting other things aside, we should first resolve this problem.

qs.s: 経験豊富な先輩を＿＿＿＿いて新入りが昇進するのは異例だ。
qs.en: It is exceptional for a newcomer to be promoted while setting aside experienced seniors.
qs.e: 差し置く(さしおく) = to set aside / bypass (someone/something deserving attention). 無視する(むしする) = to ignore. 差し引く(さしひく) = to deduct. 後回しにする = to put off.

qs.s: 「差し置く」の意味は？
o: to set aside; to bypass; to disregard
to put off; to leave for later
qs.e: 差し置く = deliberately bypassing someone or something (彼を差し置いて = passing over him, 仕事を差し置いて = setting work aside).

m: bewilderment; perplexity; embarrassment

ex.jp: 突然の質問に当惑して、うまく答えられなかった。
ex.en: Bewildered by the sudden question, I could not answer well.

qs.s: 予想外の展開に会場は＿＿＿＿の空気に包まれた。
qs.en: The venue was enveloped in an atmosphere of bewilderment at the unexpected development.
qs.e: 当惑(とうわく) = bewilderment/perplexity (not knowing how to react). 困惑(こんわく) = confusion/embarrassment (troubled, at a loss). 混乱(こんらん) = confusion/disorder (chaotic). 狼狽(ろうばい) = panic/consternation (flustered).

qs.s: 「当惑」の意味は？
o: bewilderment; perplexity (not knowing how to react)
qs.e: 当惑 = being thrown off and not knowing how to respond (当惑した表情 = a perplexed expression). 困惑 has a stronger nuance of being troubled or embarrassed.

m: the knack; the point; efficiency; gist

ex.jp: 仕事の要領を覚えてからは、残業が減った。
ex.en: Since I got the knack of the job, overtime has decreased.

qs.s: 彼は＿＿＿＿がよく、いつも最小限の努力で最大の成果を出す。
qs.en: He has a good knack for things and always gets maximum results with minimum effort.
qs.e: 要領(ようりょう) = the knack/the smart way to do something (要領がいい = efficient/smart). 効率(こうりつ) = efficiency (ratio of output to input). センス = sense/knack (innate, loanword). コツ = the trick/knack (practical tip).

qs.s: 「要領」の意味は？
o: the knack; the smart way; efficiency
qs.e: 要領 = knowing how to handle things smartly (要領を得ない = vague / doesn't get to the point, 要領がいい = knows how to work smart).

m: difficult progress; running into trouble; rough going

ex.jp: 交渉は依然として難航しており、合意の見通しが立たない。
ex.en: Negotiations are still making difficult progress and there is no prospect of agreement.

qs.s: 新製品の開発は技術的な問題で＿＿＿＿している。
qs.en: Development of the new product is running into trouble due to technical problems.
qs.e: 難航(なんこう)する = to make difficult progress / struggle (交渉が難航 = negotiations hit rough waters). 遅延(ちえん)する = to be delayed. 停滞(ていたい)する = to stagnate.

qs.s: 「難航」の意味は？
qs.e: 難航 = making slow, troubled progress (難航する交渉 = difficult negotiations, 難航続き = continued rough going). Literally: difficult sailing.

m: on the other hand; on the flip side

ex.jp: 彼は頭が切れる反面、人付き合いが苦手だ。
ex.en: On the flip side of being sharp-minded, he is poor at socializing.

qs.s: 便利な＿＿＿＿、依存しすぎるリスクもある。
qs.en: On the flip side of being convenient, there is also the risk of over-reliance.
qs.e: 反面(はんめん) = on the flip side / the other aspect (same subject, contrasting trait). 一方(いっぽう) = on the other hand (can contrast two different subjects). その反面 = on the other hand (same meaning with その). 逆に(ぎゃくに) = conversely.

qs.s: 「反面」の意味は？
o: on the flip side (same subject, opposite aspect)
on the other hand (can differ subjects)
qs.e: 反面 specifically contrasts two aspects of the same thing or person (長所の反面 = on the flip side of one's strength). It cannot introduce a completely different subject.

m: clue; lead; something to hold on to

ex.jp: 事件解決の手掛かりがようやく見つかった。
ex.en: A clue to solving the case was finally found.

qs.s: その古い写真が、行方不明の人物を探す唯一の＿＿＿＿となった。
qs.en: That old photograph became the only clue in searching for the missing person.
qs.e: 手掛かり(てがかり) = a clue / lead (alternate kanji of 手がかり). 糸口(いとぐち) = a starting thread to pull. 証拠(しょうこ) = evidence.

qs.s: 「手掛かり」の意味は？
o: clue; lead; something to go on
a starting thread (to unravel a problem)
qs.e: 手掛かり / 手がかり = something you can grab onto to make progress (犯人の手掛かり = a lead on the culprit, 手掛かりをつかむ = to get a lead).

m: brake; check; curb; putting a stop to

ex.jp: インフレに歯止めをかけるため、金利が引き上げられた。
ex.en: Interest rates were raised to put a brake on inflation.

qs.s: 少子化に＿＿＿＿をかける政策が急務となっている。
qs.en: Policies to put a brake on the declining birthrate have become urgently needed.
qs.e: 歯止め(はどめ) = a brake/check (歯止めをかける = to put a brake on something). ブレーキ = brake (loanword). 制限(せいげん) = restriction/limit. 規制(きせい) = regulation/control.

qs.s: 「歯止め」の意味は？
o: brake; check; putting a stop to
qs.e: 歯止め = a mechanism that stops runaway progress (歯止めがきかない = cannot be stopped, 歯止めをかける = to apply a brake/curb).

m: to be commensurate; to be worth it; to match

ex.jp: この仕事の給与は労働量に見合っていないと感じる。
ex.en: I feel that the salary for this job is not commensurate with the workload.

qs.s: 価格に＿＿＿＿だけの品質がなければ、顧客は離れていく。
qs.en: If the quality is not commensurate with the price, customers will leave.
qs.e: 見合う(みあう) = to be commensurate/worth it (cost vs value). 釣り合う(つりあう) = to be balanced/matched. 相応する(そうおうする) = to be appropriate/corresponding. 値する(あたいする) = to be worthy of / deserve.

qs.s: 「見合う」の意味は？
o: to be commensurate; to be worth it
to be worthy of; to deserve
qs.e: 見合う = the value matches what you put in (努力に見合う報酬 = rewards commensurate with effort, リスクに見合わない = not worth the risk).

m: in exchange for; at the cost of; in return for

ex.jp: 健康を引き換えにしてまで、仕事を続けるべきではない。
ex.en: You should not continue working at the cost of your health.

qs.s: それと＿＿＿＿に、あなたは何を差し出せますか？
qs.en: In exchange for that, what can you offer?
qs.e: 引き換え(ひきかえ) = in exchange for / at the cost of (Aと引き換えに = in exchange for A). 代わりに(かわりに) = instead / in return. 交換に(こうかんに) = in exchange. お返しに(おかえしに) = in return/as a reciprocal gift.

qs.s: 「引き換え」の意味は？
o: in exchange for; at the cost of
qs.e: 引き換え = swapping one thing for another, often at a cost (チケットと引き換えに入場 = admission in exchange for a ticket, 命と引き換えに = at the cost of one's life).

m: to rebuild; to restructure; to get back on track

ex.jp: 経営危機に陥った会社を立て直すのに三年かかった。
ex.en: It took three years to rebuild the company that had fallen into a management crisis.

qs.s: 前半で大幅に負けたが、後半で態勢を＿＿＿＿すことができた。
qs.en: We were losing heavily in the first half, but managed to get back on track in the second half.
qs.e: 立て直す(たてなおす) = to rebuild/restructure (a situation, strategy). 立ち直る(たちなおる) = to recover/bounce back (intransitive). 再建する(さいけんする) = to reconstruct/restore (formal).

qs.s: 「立て直す」の意味は？
qs.e: 立て直す = actively rebuilding something that went wrong (体制を立て直す = to restructure the system, 計画を立て直す = to revamp the plan).

m: to reach a deadlock; to be stuck; to hit a wall

ex.jp: 研究が行き詰まり、新しいアプローチを模索している。
ex.en: The research has hit a wall and I am searching for a new approach.

qs.s: 交渉が＿＿＿＿まってしまい、双方が打開策を探している。
qs.en: The negotiations have reached a deadlock and both sides are looking for a breakthrough.
qs.e: 行き詰まる(いきづまる) = to hit a dead end / be stuck. 手詰まり(てづまり) = a deadlock / no more moves (chess/go). 停滞する(ていたいする) = to stagnate.

qs.s: 「行き詰まる」の意味は？
o: to reach a deadlock; to hit a wall
to fail; to end in failure
qs.e: 行き詰まる = coming to a point where you can't go further (行き詰まり = a deadlock/impasse, 行き詰まりを打開する = to break through a deadlock).

m: single-minded; devoted to one thing; a single line

ex.jp: 彼は三十年間、教育一筋に生きてきた。
ex.en: He has devoted himself single-mindedly to education for thirty years.

qs.s: 料理＿＿＿＿に生きてきた職人の技は、見事なものだ。
qs.en: The craftsmanship of an artisan who has devoted their whole life to cooking is magnificent.
qs.e: 一筋(ひとすじ) = devoted to one thing (noun: 野球一筋 = devoted solely to baseball). 一途(いちず) = wholehearted / single-minded (adjective sense). ひたすら = simply/earnestly (adverb). 専念する(せんねんする) = to devote oneself to.

qs.s: 「一筋」の意味は？
qs.e: 一筋 = unwavering focus on one path (野球一筋 = baseball only, 一筋の希望 = a single ray of hope). Also literally: a single line/streak.

m: mechanism; device; trick; contrivance

ex.jp: このおもちゃには面白い仕掛けが施されている。
ex.en: This toy has an interesting mechanism built into it.

qs.s: マジックのタネは単純な＿＿＿＿だったが、見事に騙された。
qs.en: The trick behind the magic was a simple device, but I was brilliantly fooled.
qs.e: 仕掛け(しかけ) = a device/mechanism (often hidden or clever). 仕組み(しくみ) = how something works / mechanism (explanatory). からくり = a trick/mechanism (often surprising). トリック = a trick (loanword).

qs.s: 「仕掛け」の意味は？
qs.e: 仕掛け = a built-in mechanism or trick (仕掛け絵本 = a pop-up book, 仕掛けを施す = to set a device/trap). Also: 仕掛け人 = a puppeteer/schemer.

m: to come together; to be settled; to reach agreement

ex.jp: 長い交渉の末、ようやく話がまとまった。
ex.en: After long negotiations, the discussion finally came together.

qs.s: チームの意見が＿＿＿＿らず、プロジェクトが前に進まない。
qs.en: The team's opinions won't come together and the project can't move forward.
qs.e: まとまる(まとまる) = to come together / be settled (intransitive: 話がまとまる = the deal is settled). 一致する(いっちする) = to agree/match. まとめる(まとめる) = to put together (transitive). 統一される(とういつされる) = to be unified.

qs.s: 「まとまる」の意味は？
o: to come together; to be settled (intransitive)
qs.e: まとまる = things consolidating into a coherent whole (話がまとまる = things are settled, 意見がまとまる = opinions converge, まとまりがない = incoherent/scattered).

m: to face; to confront; to come to terms with

ex.jp: 過去の失敗と向き合うことが、成長への近道だ。
ex.en: Facing up to past failures is a shortcut to growth.

qs.s: 困難な現実から逃げずに、真剣に＿＿＿＿必要がある。
qs.en: Without running from the difficult reality, we need to face it seriously.
qs.e: 向き合う(むきあう) = to come face to face with / sit with (a problem, person). 立ち向かう(たちむかう) = to stand up against (more combative). 対峙する(たいじする) = to confront / stand face to face (formal). 直視する(ちょくしする) = to look directly at.

qs.s: 「向き合う」の意味は？
o: to face; to come to terms with
qs.e: 向き合う = being fully present with something or someone (問題と向き合う = to face a problem, 患者と向き合う = to engage with a patient directly).

m: breakthrough; breaking through a deadlock

ex.jp: 行き詰まった状況を打開するために、新しい戦略が必要だ。
ex.en: A new strategy is needed to break through the deadlocked situation.

qs.s: 局面の＿＿＿＿を図るため、トップ同士の会談が設けられた。
qs.en: A summit meeting between the leaders was arranged in order to seek a breakthrough in the situation.
qs.e: 打開(だかい) = breaking through a difficult situation. 解決(かいけつ) = resolution/solution (complete). 突破(とっぱ) = breaking through (a barrier, goal). 転換(てんかん) = a shift/change.

qs.s: 「打開」の意味は？
o: a shift; a change of direction
qs.e: 打開 = forcing a way through a stuck situation (打開策 = a way forward, 局面を打開する = to break through the current impasse).

m: aftermath; ripple effect; after-effect

ex.jp: 金融危機の余波は数年にわたって経済に影響を与えた。
ex.en: The ripple effects of the financial crisis affected the economy for several years.

qs.s: 大企業の倒産の＿＿＿＿を受けて、関連する中小企業も苦境に立たされた。
qs.en: In the wake of the major company's bankruptcy, related small and medium enterprises also found themselves in difficulty.
qs.e: 余波(よは) = ripple effect / aftermath (spreading from a major event). 影響(えいきょう) = influence/effect. 余韻(よいん) = lingering feeling/afterglow. 後遺症(こういしょう) = after-effects / lasting damage (medical/metaphorical).

qs.s: 「余波」の意味は？
qs.e: 余波 = the waves that spread out from a major event (政変の余波 = the ripple effects of a political upheaval, 余波が広がる = the ripples spread).

m: quick; swift; agile; prompt

ex.jp: 緊急事態への素早い対応が、被害を最小限に抑えた。
ex.en: Swift response to the emergency kept the damage to a minimum.

qs.s: 彼女の＿＿＿＿判断が、事故を防いだ。
qs.en: Her quick judgment prevented the accident.
qs.e: 素早い(すばやい) = quick/swift (movement, reaction). 迅速な(じんそくな) = prompt/speedy (formal, na-adj). 瞬時の(しゅんじの) = instantaneous. 機敏な(きびんな) = agile/alert.

qs.s: 「素早い」の意味は？
qs.e: 素早い = physically or mentally quick (素早い動き = quick movements, 素早く対応する = to respond swiftly). 迅速 is the more formal/written equivalent.

m: unsatisfying; lacking; leaving something to be desired

ex.jp: 内容は悪くないが、どこか物足りない気がする。
ex.en: The content isn't bad, but somehow it feels like it's lacking something.

qs.s: 一皿だけでは＿＿＿＿ので、もう一品注文した。
qs.en: One dish left me wanting more, so I ordered another.
qs.e: 物足りない(ものたりない) = leaving something to be desired / unsatisfying (a subtle feeling of lack). 足りない(たりない) = insufficient/not enough (factual lack). 不十分な(ふじゅうぶんな) = insufficient (formal). 少ない(すくない) = few/little.

qs.s: 「物足りない」の意味は？
o: unsatisfying; leaving sth to be desired
qs.e: 物足りない = that feeling of 'something's missing' even when nothing is technically wrong (物足りなさを感じる = to feel a sense of dissatisfaction, 物足りない結果 = a result that falls short of what you hoped).

m: to get used to; to fit in; to blend in

ex.jp: 新しい職場に馴染むのに少し時間がかかったが、今は楽しく働いている。
ex.en: It took a little time to fit into the new workplace, but now I am working happily.

qs.s: 外国の文化に＿＿＿＿のは大変だが、充実した経験になる。
qs.en: It is difficult to blend in with a foreign culture, but it becomes a fulfilling experience.
qs.e: 馴染む(なじむ) = to fit in / become familiar with (gradual, natural process). 慣れる(なれる) = to get used to. 溶け込む(とけこむ) = to blend in / merge (complete assimilation). 適応する(てきおうする) = to adapt.

qs.s: 「馴染む」の意味は？
o: to fit in; to become familiar (gradual)
to blend in; to merge completely
qs.e: 馴染む = becoming comfortable and familiar (環境に馴染む = to settle into an environment, 馴染みの店 = a familiar/regular shop, 馴染みのない言葉 = an unfamiliar word).

m: to spread throughout; to reach everywhere; to permeate

ex.jp: 支援物資が被災地全体に行き渡るのに一週間かかった。
ex.en: It took one week for aid supplies to reach throughout the entire disaster-stricken area.

qs.s: インターネットが社会全体に＿＿＿＿、情報格差が縮まってきた。
qs.en: As the internet has spread throughout society, the information gap has been narrowing.
qs.e: 行き渡る(いきわたる) = to reach every corner / spread throughout. 普及する(ふきゅうする) = to become widespread. 広まる(ひろまる) = to spread (information, custom). 浸透する(しんとうする) = to permeate/sink in.

qs.s: 「行き渡る」の意味は？
o: to spread throughout; to reach everywhere
qs.e: 行き渡る = reaching every single place or person (全員に情報が行き渡る = information reaches everyone, 隅々まで行き渡る = to reach every corner).

m: review; revision; reassessment

ex.jp: 政策の見直しを求める声が高まっている。
ex.en: Calls for a review of the policy are growing.

qs.s: 予算配分の＿＿＿＿が必要だという意見が委員会から出た。
qs.en: An opinion came from the committee that a review of budget allocation is needed.
qs.e: 見直し(みなおし) = a review/reassessment. 改正(かいせい) = an amendment (of a law). 再検討(さいけんとう) = a reconsideration (formal). 見直すこと = the act of reviewing.

qs.s: 「見直し」の意味は？
qs.e: 見直し = taking a fresh look at something (料金見直し = fare revision, 見直しを迫られる = to be forced into a review). Also: 彼を見直した = I've revised my opinion of him upward.

m: without exception; all; every single one

ex.jp: 応募者全員にもれなく記念品をプレゼントします。
ex.en: We will give a commemorative gift to every single applicant without exception.

qs.s: このキャンペーンは参加者＿＿＿＿に特典が付いてきます。
qs.en: This campaign comes with a benefit for every single participant.
qs.e: もれなく = without a single exception / every last one (often in advertising). 全員に(ぜんいんに) = to all members. 例外なく(れいがいなく) = without exception. 一人残らず(ひとりのこらず) = without leaving a single person out.

qs.s: 「もれなく」の意味は？
o: without leaving a single person out
qs.e: もれなく is commonly used in promotions and official announcements (もれなくプレゼント = a gift for every single person, もれなく伝える = to inform everyone without omission).

m: understaffed; thinly spread; inadequate

ex.jp: 夜間は警備が手薄になるため、別の対策が必要だ。
ex.en: Because security becomes thin at night, additional measures are needed.

qs.s: この分野の知識が＿＿＿＿なので、専門家に相談することにした。
qs.en: Since my knowledge of this field is thin, I decided to consult a specialist.
qs.e: 手薄(てうす) = thinly covered / understaffed (not enough resources). 不十分(ふじゅうぶん) = insufficient. 不足(ふそく) = shortage/lack. 乏しい(とぼしい) = scarce/meager.

qs.s: 「手薄」の意味は？
qs.e: 手薄 = not having enough people or resources to cover something properly (警備が手薄 = security is thin, 手薄な布陣 = a thin lineup/formation).

m: to take root; to become established; to be ingrained

ex.jp: その文化はこの地域に深く根付いている。
ex.en: That culture is deeply rooted in this region.

qs.s: 新しい習慣が社会に＿＿＿＿くには時間がかかる。
qs.en: It takes time for a new custom to take root in society.
qs.e: 根付く(ねづく) = to take root (become firmly established over time). 定着する(ていちゃくする) = to become established/settled. 浸透する(しんとうする) = to permeate/spread. 広まる(ひろまる) = to spread.

qs.s: 「根付く」の意味は？
o: to take root; to become established
to become settled; to take hold
qs.e: 根付く = becoming so embedded it won't easily be removed (文化が根付く = a culture takes root, 根付いた慣習 = an ingrained custom).

m: to turn one's attention to; to look toward

ex.jp: 国内だけでなく、海外の動向にも目を向けることが重要だ。
ex.en: It is important to turn attention not only to domestic trends but also to international ones.

qs.s: 問題の原因に＿＿＿＿けることなく、表面的な対処だけを続けた。
qs.en: Without turning attention to the cause of the problem, they continued only superficial measures.
qs.e: 目を向ける(めをむける) = to turn one's gaze/attention toward. 注目する(ちゅうもくする) = to pay attention to / focus on. 着目する(ちゃくもくする) = to focus on / pay heed to. 目指す(めざす) = to aim for.

qs.s: 「目を向ける」の意味は？
o: to turn attention to; to look toward
to focus on; to pay attention to
to pay heed to; to focus on
qs.e: 目を向ける = directing your awareness somewhere (弱者に目を向ける = to turn one's attention to the vulnerable, 未来に目を向ける = to look to the future).

m: to prove; to demonstrate; to establish (a fact)

ex.jp: 無罪を立証するには、確かな証拠が必要だ。
ex.en: Solid evidence is needed to prove innocence.

qs.s: その理論の正しさを実験で＿＿＿＿ことができた。
qs.en: We were able to demonstrate the correctness of the theory through experiment.
qs.e: 立証する(りっしょうする) = to prove/establish (legally or formally). 証明する(しょうめいする) = to prove/certify. 実証する(じっしょうする) = to demonstrate empirically. 検証する(けんしょうする) = to verify/examine.

qs.s: 「立証する」の意味は？
qs.e: 立証 = establishing something as fact, especially in legal or academic contexts (無実を立証する = to prove innocence, 立証責任 = burden of proof).

m: reservation; constraint; hesitation (about bothering others)

ex.jp: 一人暮らしなので、夜遅く帰っても気兼ねなくていい。
ex.en: Since I live alone, I don't have to worry about bothering anyone coming home late at night.

qs.s: 遠慮や＿＿＿＿なしに、何でも相談してください。
qs.en: Please consult me about anything without reserve or worry about imposing.
qs.e: 気兼ね(きがね) = hesitation about being a burden to others. 遠慮(えんりょ) = restraint/holding back (modesty). 躊躇(ちゅうちょ) = hesitation/reluctance. 気遣い(きづかい) = consideration/care for others.

qs.s: 「気兼ね」の意味は？
o: constraint; worry about being a burden
qs.e: 気兼ねなく = without worrying about imposing (気兼ねなく話す = to speak freely, 気兼ねのいらない関係 = a relationship where you don't have to hold back).

m: clearly; obviously; evidently

ex.jp: その説明は明らかに事実と矛盾している。
ex.en: That explanation is clearly contradicted by the facts.

qs.s: 彼の態度は＿＿＿＿昨日と違っており、何かあったのだろう。
qs.en: His attitude is obviously different from yesterday; something must have happened.
qs.e: 明らかに(あきらかに) = clearly/evidently (observable). 明確に(めいかくに) = clearly/unambiguously (stated). はっきりと = clearly (direct, spoken). 明白に(めいはくに) = obviously/patently (stronger).

qs.s: 「明らかに」の意味は？
qs.e: 明らかに = plainly apparent to observation (明らかに間違っている = clearly wrong, 明らかになる = to become clear/be revealed).

m: especially; particularly; above all

ex.jp: この地域はとりわけ冬の寒さが厳しい。
ex.en: This region is especially harsh in winter cold.

qs.s: 参加者の中で＿＿＿＿活躍したのは、最年少のメンバーだった。
qs.en: The one who stood out above all among the participants was the youngest member.
qs.e: とりわけ = especially/above all (formal/written). 特に(とくに) = especially (general). ひときわ = conspicuously / notably (stands out visually). とくべつ = special/particular.

qs.s: 「とりわけ」の意味は？
qs.e: とりわけ = singling something out as exceptional (とりわけ重要な点 = a particularly important point). It is more literary than 特に and often appears in written texts.

m: once; formerly; in the past; ever (with negative)

ex.jp: この街はかつて繁栄していたが、今は面影もない。
ex.en: This town once prospered, but now there is no trace of it.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿ないほどの大雪が降り、交通機関が完全に麻痺した。
qs.en: Snow fell like never before and transportation was completely paralyzed.
qs.e: かつて = once (in the past) / ever (with negative: かつてない = unprecedented). 以前(いぜん) = before / previously. 昔(むかし) = in the old days / long ago. かつてない = unprecedented (set phrase).

qs.s: 「かつて」の意味は？
o: long ago; in the old days
qs.e: かつて = at some past time (かつて存在した = once existed). With negatives: かつてない規模 = an unprecedented scale, かつて経験したことがない = never experienced before.

m: to surround; to encircle; to envelop

ex.jp: 私たちを取り巻く環境は急速に変化している。
ex.en: The environment surrounding us is changing rapidly.

qs.s: 国際情勢を＿＿＿＿状況は複雑だ。
qs.en: The situation surrounding the international situation is complex.
qs.e: 取り巻く(とりまく) = to surround (circumstances, environment — abstract or physical). 囲む(かこむ) = to surround (physical). 取り囲む(とりかこむ) = to surround from all sides. 包む(つつむ) = to wrap / envelop.

qs.s: 「取り巻く」の意味は？
o: to surround; to envelop (abstract or physical)
qs.e: 取り巻く = the things that form one's context or circle (取り巻く環境 = the surrounding environment, 取り巻き = hangers-on / entourage).

m: to be equipped with; to be gifted with; to be inherent in

ex.jp: 彼には生まれつき優れたリーダーシップが備わっている。
ex.en: He is inherently equipped with excellent leadership.

qs.s: この製品には最新の安全機能が＿＿＿＿っている。
qs.en: This product is equipped with the latest safety features.
qs.e: 備わる(そなわる) = to be endowed with / naturally equipped (intransitive). 装備される(そうびされる) = to be equipped (military/technical). 搭載される(とうさいされる) = to be mounted/installed (tech). 付く(つく) = to come with / be attached.

qs.s: 「備わる」の意味は？
o: to be endowed with; naturally equipped
to be installed; to be mounted
to come with; to be attached
qs.e: 備わる = having something as an inherent quality (才能が備わる = to be gifted with talent, 機能が備わる = to be equipped with a function). More organic than 装備される.

m: to accumulate; to pile up; to build up over time

ex.jp: 長年の努力を積み重ねた結果、今の自分がある。
ex.en: The person I am today is the result of accumulating years of effort.

qs.s: 失敗を恐れず経験を＿＿＿＿ることが、成長への道だ。
qs.en: Accumulating experience without fearing failure is the road to growth.
qs.e: 積み重ねる(つみかさねる) = to accumulate layer by layer over time. 積み上げる(つみあげる) = to stack up / build up. 蓄積する(ちくせきする) = to accumulate (formal). 重ねる(かさねる) = to layer/repeat.

qs.s: 「積み重ねる」の意味は？
o: to accumulate layer by layer over time
to stack up; to build up
qs.e: 積み重ねる = building something through sustained, repeated effort (実績を積み重ねる = to build a track record, 積み重ねてきた努力 = accumulated efforts over time).

m: to have both; to combine; to be endowed with both

ex.jp: 彼女は美しさと知性を兼ね備えた人だ。
ex.en: She is a person who combines both beauty and intelligence.

qs.s: 実用性とデザイン性を＿＿＿＿た製品が消費者に支持されている。
qs.en: Products that combine both practicality and design appeal are favoured by consumers.
qs.e: 兼ね備える(かねそなえる) = to possess both qualities simultaneously. 両立させる(りょうりつさせる) = to make both coexist. 備える(そなえる) = to equip with / prepare. 持ち合わせる(もちあわせる) = to happen to have.

qs.s: 「兼ね備える」の意味は？
o: to have both; to combine two qualities
qs.e: 兼ね備える = being endowed with two things at once (知識と経験を兼ね備える = to have both knowledge and experience).

m: to question; to pose a question to; to raise the question of

ex.jp: この映画は現代社会のあり方に深く問いかけている。
ex.en: This film deeply questions the way modern society is.

qs.s: 自分自身に＿＿＿＿ことで、本当にやりたいことが見えてくる。
qs.en: By posing questions to yourself, what you truly want to do becomes visible.
qs.e: 問いかける(といかける) = to direct a question at someone or something (society, oneself). 問い直す(といなおす) = to re-examine/question again. 自問する(じもんする) = to ask oneself. 問う(とう) = to question / call to account (formal).

qs.s: 「問いかける」の意味は？
o: to pose a question to; to raise the question
to question; to call to account (formal)
qs.e: 問いかける = directing a question outward (観客に問いかける = to pose questions to the audience, 社会に問いかける = to challenge society to reflect).

m: to come to mind; to think of; to realize

ex.jp: なぜ彼が怒っているのか、思い当たる節がある。
ex.en: I have some idea of why he is angry.

qs.s: 心当たりはありますか？＿＿＿＿ことがあれば教えてください。
qs.en: Do you have any idea? If anything comes to mind, please let me know.
qs.e: 思い当たる(おもいあたる) = to have something come to mind as a likely cause or reason. 思い出す(おもいだす) = to recall a memory. 気づく(きづく) = to notice / become aware of. 思い当たる節がある = I think I know why.

qs.s: 「思い当たる」の意味は？
o: to come to mind; to think of a likely reason
to notice; to become aware of
qs.e: 思い当たる = something clicking as a likely explanation (思い当たる節がある = there is something that comes to mind as a reason, 思い当たらない = nothing comes to mind).

m: consistency; coherence; logical consistency

ex.jp: 前後の発言に整合性がないと、信頼を失う。
ex.en: If there is no consistency between what you said before and after, you lose trust.

qs.s: この計画は目標と手段の間に＿＿＿＿がとれていない。
qs.en: This plan lacks coherence between the goals and the means.
qs.e: 整合性(せいごうせい) = logical consistency between parts of a system or argument. 一貫性(いっかんせい) = consistency (of attitude, policy over time). 矛盾(むじゅん) = contradiction. つじつま = coherence (つじつまが合わない = doesn't add up).

qs.s: 「整合性」の意味は？
o: coherence (つじつまが合う = adds up)
qs.e: 整合性 = parts fitting together logically (データの整合性 = data consistency, 整合性がとれている = internally consistent).

m: the former

ex.jp: 二つの方法があるが、前者の方が効率的だ。
ex.en: There are two methods, but the former is more efficient.

qs.s: 速さと正確さのどちらを優先するかと言えば、私は＿＿＿＿より後者を選ぶ。
qs.en: If asked which to prioritize, speed or accuracy, I would choose the latter over the former.
qs.e: 前者(ぜんしゃ) = the former (the first of two mentioned). 後者(こうしゃ) = the latter. それ = that. 一方(いっぽう) = one side / on the other hand.

qs.s: 「前者」の意味は？
qs.e: 前者 always refers back to the first of two items just mentioned (前者と後者 = the former and the latter). Used in written/formal contexts to avoid repetition.

m: the latter

ex.jp: 質と量を比べたとき、後者より前者を優先すべきだ。
ex.en: When comparing quality and quantity, the former should be prioritized over the latter.

qs.s: AとBの二案があるが、コスト面では＿＿＿＿の方が有利だ。
qs.en: There are two proposals, A and B, but the latter is more advantageous in terms of cost.
qs.e: 後者(こうしゃ) = the latter (second of two). 前者(ぜんしゃ) = the former. 後者の方が = the latter is more ~. 二番目(にばんめ) = the second one.

qs.s: 「後者」の意味は？
qs.e: 後者 refers back to the second of two items mentioned (前者・後者 = the former and the latter). Used to avoid repeating a long noun phrase.

m: characteristic; feature; distinguishing trait

ex.jp: この製品の最大の特徴は、軽くて丈夫な点だ。
ex.en: The greatest feature of this product is that it is light and durable.

qs.s: 彼女の絵には独特の＿＿＿＿があり、誰の作品かすぐわかる。
qs.en: Her paintings have a distinctive characteristic and you can immediately tell whose work they are.
qs.e: 特徴(とくちょう) = a distinguishing feature (observable). 特色(とくしょく) = a distinctive characteristic (positive quality). 個性(こせい) = individuality (personal uniqueness). 特性(とくせい) = a special property/characteristic (inherent quality).

qs.s: 「特徴」の意味は？
qs.e: 特徴 = what makes something recognizable (特徴を捉える = to capture the characteristic, 特徴的な = distinctive/characteristic, 特徴を活かす = to leverage one's strengths).
